C5 80 B5 02 70 C5 80 C8 49 00 0C 06 01 0B 14 CD
75 07 14 CD 7F 05 DB FF

C5 80			; Screen flash (must use twice?)
B5 02 			; Play Sound Effect 02
70 
C5 80 			; Screen flash
C8 49 00		; Show Text 0049
0C 
06 
01				; Player Move Up 
0B 
14 
CD 75 07 		; Run Event 0775 (Fist Pump)
14 
CD 7F 05 		; Run Event 057F (actual healing)
DB 
FF
